Off Calendar Jul-05-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT IX LAYER, INC.'s DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

"Defendant's demurrer to the second cause of action in plaintiff's first amended complaint" is overruled. The second cause (breach of implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing) goes "beyond the statement of a mere contract breach." (Careau v. Security Pacific Business Credit, Inc. (1990) 222 Cal.App.3d 1371, 1395.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
